description: Chainweb HTTP API: local sim, pre-signed send, poll, table reads, SPV proofs, module deploys.
name: io.github.Pact-Community-Organization/chainweb

environmentVariables.description: Workspace root directory; all file access is confined inside it.
environmentVariables.name: PACT_COMMUNITY_WORKSPACE_ROOT

environmentVariables.description: Network mode; must be set and match PACT_COMMUNITY_CHAINWEB_PROFILE (devnet, testnet06, or mainnet).
environmentVariables.name: PACT_COMMUNITY_CHAINWEB_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Network profile: devnet (default, read/write), testnet06, or mainnet (both read-only).
environmentVariables.name: PACT_COMMUNITY_CHAINWEB_PROFILE

environmentVariables.description: Chainweb node base URL (default per profile).
environmentVariables.name: PACT_COMMUNITY_CHAINWEB_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Network id, e.g. development, testnet06, mainnet01 (default per profile).
environmentVariables.name: PACT_COMMUNITY_CHAINWEB_NETWORK_ID

title: Chainweb API
